---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for AIVC DACH
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What's the problem you're trying to solve? What can't you do today?

## Proposed solution

How could AIVC DACH solve this? Be as specific as you can – mockups, sketches, example commands all welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they don't fit.

## Scope

- [ ] Small (one template, one CLI flag, one doc page)
- [ ] Medium (new helper command, new SKILL.md section)
- [ ] Large (new render mode, new output format, breaking change)

## Additional context

Links, examples, related issues.
